review_text: Old facilities. Unkempt grounds. Could be good if maintained better.
Great spot, I stay here for work as its close and close to 24 hour IGA, plenty of parking. Room is always clean. Pool is always clean.

Called in on behalf of relatives coming over at Christmas time and found there is new owners here. They have plans for this run down park and since visiting on driving past we could see improvements already. Location wise they are at least 20 minutes from the cbd and 15 minutes to the beach . I think without doubt this place will improve dramatically and will re-check again before booking
Disgraceful. Dirty old place that thinks it’s ok to operate. No care given. Unbelievable.

Wish there was a "minus" star rating as this place would be it. !   I had already paid ahead but they went to charge us again.  It was Run down, overgrown, dirty, broken security gates and swimming pool and the office door hard to open. Amenities disgusting.|Lack of toilet rolls, paper towel and hand soap.  Overheard, one lady say, on arriving at her cabin, it had not been cleaned yet... eeek!    The site we were allocated to was already occupied. So they squeezed us in the permanents section.
I would not recommend this place.

I stayed hear for a night the pool is very good lovely people there great reception staff made sure she could accommodate us I lived there in a bus in 2011 it's a shame game room not there the cabin my mum didn't go much on but the manager he was very nice said about them only having it for short while he offered us a later checkout apart from the bees and wasps at pool was excellent will be back without my mum next time the manager will get it back up to scratch thanks for a lovely night away

Skøn plads, som godt nok er gammel og silde, men man kan også godt se at der er kommet nye friske kræfter til som hele tiden arbejder på at forbedre pladsen for fastlægger samt dem som bare kommer på besøg et par dage eller 3, god pool med sol og skygge, super findt med et indhegnede område hvor ens hund kan løbe frit rundt også, fælles bad og wv er lidt slidt men man kan se at man er begyndt med lift maling der men også o fælles kønnet,
The stay was acceptable; however, there was no lobby, and the emergency phone number was not functioning properly.

This place is totally run down. The male showers and toilets are in a shocking state. Some are so broken that they just run day and night. What a waste of water and by the looks of it for a very long time. The females is a little better. Staff is nice. They have some dog runs. Everything else looks like it's been done in the 90s and nothing gets fixed when it breaks
The dirtiest caravan park we have done after 2 weeks around Western Australia. 50$ for that…
5 stars all the way

We booked an ensuite caravan site for 3 weeks until our house was ready. We were near the road & had no issues. Clean ensuite & large caravan sites. New management are fantastic, trying hard to help everyone as best they can. 2 dog parks which was great as our dogs can be a bit narky so they could be separated from the other dogs.

Auf unserer 50 tägigen Australien Reise einer der schlechtesten. Ungepflegt und heruntergekommen. Weiteres Manko, es gibt kein Wifi, was gerade für ausländische Urlauber sehr wichtig ist. Einzig die gute Lage und der Pool können punkten.

New management,  very friendly staff, excellent service.  They accommodated us. Thankyou Jamie. You and your team are doing an amazing job cleaning up this park in your first couple months . The pool looks cool, clean and very inviting. Its a great location to buses, trains, or cycling . The cycling path into perth was superb, awesome.  Shopping centre 10 minutes walk away. We will definitely be back someday, can't wait to see the progress.

Take previous reviews with a pinch of salt, I think a lot of people are expecting Big4 quality for 1/3rd of the price.

Location is great, walking distance to shops and eateries, public transport to the city right outside meaning you can park and leave the car here the whole time.

Large concrete sites, access can be tight if people are parked inconsiderately but will move if needed. Large clean pool with seating, large camp kitchen with cooking facilities as well as 2 seperate bbq areas with half a dozen bbqs and sinks which was great as not over crowded like some sites.

Mix of permanents and tourists and unfortunatly some of the permanents areas are a little messy, but majority are towards the rear of the park so actually quite seperate from the tourist area and it’s clear new management are trying to resolve this. Toilet block is dated but not dirty and that’s the key difference. Was cleaned daily and well but there is clearly some maintenance needed, but broken tiles and leaky taps don’t mean dirty and it was certainly usable.

The key is you get what you pay for, value for money was great especially if looking for a base to explore the city and northern beaches, and a park the decent amenities to come back too.

I stayed hear the 31 lady at reception was so helpful made sure we got a room very nice manager was kind told us we could have a later checkout being Sunday I will definitely be back the pool was a bit for all of us lovely people around thank u for the getaway
Very run down but new managers are energetic and trying hard to improve it. I really hope owners support them.
Awesome place,  closed to everything 🙏🙏🙏
Staff very friendly and location perfect when you need a campsite to go to rottnest via Hillary. Old ammendenties, not clean and please remove the red curtains in the showers.
It needs a lot of work.

Absolutely unacceptable – avoid

I booked and paid $200 for four nights as a tent site at Kingsway Tourist Park, booking three weeks in advance through their own website.

After traveling for three weeks, we arrived only to be told there had been a change of management and tent sites were no longer available. No warning. No alternative. Just “sorry”.

This was right after Christmas, when everything else was completely booked out, leaving us stranded with nowhere to stay.

We received no phone call, no email, no message of any kind. They took the booking, took the money, and didn’t bother to notify us that our accommodation no longer existed.

This is extremely poor management, zero customer care, and an absolute failure in basic communication. A simple phone call could have avoided a major disruption to our trip.

If you value reliability, do not trust this park with your booking.

Location is great but what a shame, WA (Australia) is better than this.  We have been to the outback and never been in such a poorly maintained, unclean and unsafe caravan park.  Ensuite, apparently updated, has rusty walls and pipes, trip hazards with lifting pavers, very poor concrete pads for caravans and lots of spider webs and dead insects around and in the ensuite, clearly not cleaned for a long time.  To the owners - If you can't afford to keep up the safety and sanitary standards, then we suggest you close at least part of the park until you can.

Caravan park is fine! Just a regular old Australian caravan park. I believe under new ownership so I’d say things will start becoming a bit more sharp soon. However, if you sleep in anything of a tent form / not double lined walls I’d stay away from this area. The road racing/ noise at nice is beyond a joke. I didn’t get a wink of sleep one night. Police were all but useless on the matter. Very unfortunate to anyone who lives in the area.

Easy check in perfect location as we have b-ball Warwick
Shops 5 min walk
Friendly management
Get what pay for but it is cozy and clean
Cabin has 2 sets of bunks and double bed
B-ball court soccer goals and great playground

Lovely quiet park. We stayed for 10 days ensuite site. Ensuite was ok. Was a bit dusty from dust under door. An exhaust fan would be beneficial. We could see improvements with cleaning up of rubbish and gardening and repairs.

Hidden gem that needs a polish. We stayed here for three nights recently. Can see that things have been let go a bit but also improvements seem to be happening. Great location and super quiet, very close to shopping centre (walking distance). Absolutely no issues with the permanents on site who are more up the back of the park. Amenities block needs some work however relatively clean with good shower pressure. Given the age of the park can see it's a work in progress. Staff were fantastic to deal with and very accommodating. Overall would stay again.
Changed their policy without notifying anybody, which led to a lot of people leaving the park, water leaks nearly everyday.
Stayed for 4night everyone is friendly staff are wonderful and pet cabins are great, would stay there again...
very good , staff are friendly and welcoming

I stayed in a cabin for 2 days. Very pleasant. The shower was lovely. Very comfortable bed and nice and cool as air con and ceiling fans were there. A very nice pool and the gardens are lovely. Very friendly staff. I will be back again

An absolute shambles of an accomodation, do not waste your time booking here! There is far better alternatives!! A cabin with a blind that fell down the first night, taps that hardly worked in the ensuite (required you to fiddle with the taps to get running water) Lino that had various tears and bubbles, the flooring near the kitchen sink that felt like it was going to cave in at any moment and disgustingly filthy throughout.. Oh, and how’s this? A disassembled pedestal fan on the top of the wardrobe in case you get a little hot, covered in filth.. It also makes me wonder if the bed linen is ever washed from person to person or if cleaning practices are upheld (maybe a phone call to the City of Wanneroo) and Department of Health is required to check your procedures are up to date and aligned to what you’re charging people. I have written to the shire in regards to a non functioning fire alarm, which is illegal to have guests stay in a self contained room / accomodation with a kitchen without one working or at least tested, per your comments, no we didn’t raise this with reception because testing of your facilities and its amenities should be your priority! Do not reply to this review with arrogance or I will take matters further!

I strongly urge people to avoid Acclaim Tourist Parks KIngsway at all costs!!! Absolute joke of a place.

Checked on line for any sites available before I went into the office and they had a fair few available. Soon as I asked the older guy in glasses said nope we are over full and nothing till after January. I work with tourism Australia and this is not good business plus he didn’t even check the booking sites for any space just a straight NO
Very old and run down.  Looks more like a half way location for long term residence.  Caravan pad was broken on one corner not small very large part.

We stayed here at the last minute because we could not find availability anywhere else. Not a surprise this place had openings. It was a bit scare to be honest. Overgrown grass, really shady people living there in campervans turned into home. The bathrooms were not clean or well maintained. We are a family of four and did not go out after the sunset. Very poor lighting as well. I would never stay again nor would recommend any family staying here.
The management are amazing,
Stayed 2 nights nice hot showers friendly staff very helpfull over all good park Recommended will definitely be back in the future

Location was good as we had soccer nearby.  The toilets and showers were disgusting. They did not get cleaned once during our 8 day stay, even after notifying the office staff. Hair and sand throughout shower cubicles, toilet paper all over floor. Pretty sure we would never choose to stay there again.

The park is very run down the toilets and showers are old in poor condition. The dump point is worse than the toilets it had a lid made out of a cut down garbage bin and it didn't seal properly and the concrete was a mess with a pipe hanging out it was disgusting. However the staff in office were lovely.

Disgusting toilets and very rude staff
Was kicked out on a fake complaint that had nothing to do with me
Way too many trees that were not trimmed anywhere near enough
Easy access . Staff are great very obliging . Showers nee a bit if work but they are clean. All round pretty good. Nice and central. But the staff always willing to help.

Having stayed in several carparks as a part of my travels, I was horrified and disgusted with the filth in our rental cottage.  While the sheets were clean, the bathroom shower had so much grime I was concerned about getting a foot fungus and showered at the home of people we were visiting.  I understand it isn't a hotel, but for this to be listed as an option on Bookings.com in the price range of $150-$170 a night, a clean room is not a lot to ask for and I would never have thought about it not being clean.  The floors were so filthy my socks were black.

The car park does offer some services for those who are renting space for their campers, but the lots and public areas are not maintained.

I wanted to share this so the owners can take action and for travelers who are seeking a place to sleep they understand what they are getting and have very low expectations, especially for the price.

I wish I could post pictures so you could see it for yourself.

I stayed at kingsway for near 3 months. I felt safe secured and really enjoyed my stay. My site was great close to the bathroom which was always clean, tidy and shower curtains changed everyweek. Everyweek, the bins were always cleared out in the morning, afternoons and clearing of the trees and leaves, not an issue to me. I found management, (Skye ) to be a straightforward person and straightshooter, i really enjoyed her character she is a very kind and caring lady but don't play her, she's no fool. The donated food offered every second day to all park stayers was really yummy also.  I don't need spick and span.  It is cosy, comfortable and safe, prices are decent. The permanent stayers, said hello, small talk, just the way I like it.
I will stay again.
The question is, will i be allowed to stay, next time?
Thank you Sky, Richard and your team. I enjoyed my stay with you.
My stay was great I was there for a few weeks! A very friendly park and the staff were always there to help and really welcoming!!
這種澳洲的渡假營酒店一般都不會有什麼服務. 但無提供吹風筒. 我覺得這樣太不方便.這次是因為所探朋友是居於附近, 所以才住上這渡假營酒店. 整個渡假營的環境, 感覺有些亂.以上的原因, 覺得價錢太貴.

On our month long holiday this is by far the worst facilities we have seen. Our ensuite was nearly inhabitable. It badly smelled of mildew and sewage. The toilet that wouldn’t flush properly, it had a disgusting old shower curtain and loose tap fittings. At night access to ensuite was unsafe no outside lighting, with broken concrete. I would advise staying elsewhere
Great spot to see heaps in Perth. The site is clean and well maintained. It has a good off-the- leash dog exercise area.  People were friendly and helpful.
It's a really relaxing and lovely park, yes it's a bit older but it truly has been the best stay I've had in Perth with my caravan so far. Lovely people and amenities are just what you need!

Amenities block the worst we encountered in our 6 weeks of travel.  Showers & urinals leaking, some doors wouldn't close, their cleaning routine consisted of just a quick wipe over the tops of toilet seats,  but underside of seats & bowls not touched, floors quick mop over, vanity tops quick wipe but again bowls not touched. Stay away from this one :(

Location suited where we needed to be. Failed to meet expectations at check-in, as they lost the booking and got the dates wrong. First room was not even average, 2nd was better, though. They did get brownie points for having an on site , off leash dog run.

If you're seeking a caravan park with all the frills, this might not be the place for you 🏕️. However, it's worth noting that the park is currently undergoing renovations, including tree removal. As for the appearance of the full-time residents' site, beauty is in the eye of the beholder, and it's up to you to decide whether it meets your standards 👀.
The staff here are a real treat, their warm and welcoming demeanor is a park above the rest, where often you're left feeling like just another number.
While the amenities may not be the newest, they're clean and well-maintained. We felt safe and secure, and the only real drawback is the traffic noise – a small price to pay for the convenience of the location. This establishment is worthy of more recognition and better reviews, in my opinion, as someone who advocates for small businesses.
This park suited our needs for proximity, its has a dog run and facilities were clean and tidy.
Good , close to everything, clean worth the stay..

Felt like a run down park and pictures speak for themselves. Seems like a lot of people live there not so many there for holidays. We spent 2 nights there exploring Perth. Felt safe but glad that we had our own van and didn't have to use the cabins. We won't be going there again. Was close to shops, service station, fast food.

the staff were very friendly and helpful, they quickly responded&helped as we had a small issue at first. the laundry room seems new and was clean.

the spot itself which we had, was broken pavement and not something nice. we were inbetween permanent residents, which there seems to be many of them, and a lot of those spots were run down, full of garbage and like bunkers. it had a bit of a creepy vibe. the facilities (toilets/showers) were not clean and run down. so for a night I guess it‘s okay, as it is very close to the city.

The photos speak for themselves! Broken showers on the floor, rust everywhere, broken window in bathroom and locks on the toilet that don’t work! Avoid this place at all costs!! Complete waste of money, can’t believe the prices they ask for with it looking the state it’s in. And the management replying the way they do rather then taking action on the complaints says it all. I’d advise Taking a customer service lesson, it’s embarrassing for yourself and your business…

Chalet was for 3 days.|Beds all in the one living  space.|Bathroom ample room and shower space good.|Sufficient space as mostly there in the afternoons.|Kitchen space Sufficient. |Was quieter than I expected.|Will be back in August for Tenpin Nationals |Nice porch and friendly neighbours in the other chalets

Very dated
Needs some work to update ablution  blocks camper kitchen wich is very basic and outdoors. Staff are friendly  and helpful but wouldn't return in a hurry .

Came in motorhome, stayed 3 days & nights. Absolutely a dump!! Broken concrete pavers everywhere a potential insurance claim awating you could break your ankle on! Ensuite we hired smelly cobwebs every where. Trees need triming badly. Don't believe the pictures that are posted nothing like it!!
Most are full-time Tennant's here in dilapidated buses, or vans that old ugly old annexes definitely have been here for years & don't take pride in their areas.
Clothes lines date back about 40 years Rotary's. Communal showers & toilets 3 stars only they don't lock as supposed too.. poorly maintained grass areas. No wi-fi. When asked oh we don't supply in a black hole area. Lacking in paint. Needs to have aleast 2 - 3 million on it to bring it up too anything enjoyable & liveable.
Good point 🙄🤔
Pool looks clean & inviting with resident ducks!! Traffic noise ugh don't get me started!! I hope my review is taken seriously avoid at all costs unless your desperate...
Pretty gritty park. A nice pool though. Inexpensive so that’s OK.

EDIT.I rest my case. You're response to our complaint just proved my point, and others who have complained about about management not taking responsibility for your park and management's shortcomings. You may not have noticed, but I too have a camera in my car that records our speed and we have photos of the condition of the toilet and blockage, both of which have been supplied to Acclaim. Would you like me to post the photos of the toilet and video proving we weren't speeding here? I'm happy to but it won't look good for you.

Original complaint: We’ve always stayed at this park when travelling through Perth and always recommended it to fellow travellers. Well that came to a grinding halt after our latest visit. Will never go back and will now warn fellow travellers to stay away. I don’t know if management has changed or if there’s new owners, but not only is the park in a dreadful state of disrepair, worse than ever before, but the staff have become rude, extremely unhelpful, and make it a point of always blaming visitors when complaints are made or issues are reported, instead of taking responsibility for the state of the park, park amenities and general attitude of grounds staff. It’s about time Acclaim remove their association from this park or get the management to up their game. Oh, and even when you do bring issues like a blocked toilet in the on suite before you’ve even got to use it, the response was “we don’t know when we’ll get to it”. 5 days later we still couldn’t use the on suite we’d paid for. Give this park a miss, not even the security chain on the park entrance works anymore.

Great Caravan Park plenty of showers and toilets and bins, everyone is friendly, it’s pet friendly, child friendly, great location, what more could you ask for they also organise for food donations it’s great my family love it 👍

Really friendly place, but.... Dog poo everywhere and broken glass. Gardens are awful and not maintained. Lots of big trees with dead hang directly above sites. Not many bins. Rubbish and garden debris everywhere. Not a lot of grass near sites.
Look it's good for a night or 2 but otherwise it's so poorly maintained and cared for.
One of my favourite parks for location, Staff are always helpful.
Great park highly recommended

The Acclaim Kingsway
my go to for short business stays ,often longer holiday accommodation.
Location is great.
The ambience of the park - quiet,homely
Pricing -not matched
Renovations , upgrades and maintenance all cyclic and notifications prior to inconvenience.
After hours the surety of an answered call & bed (and a kind did I need airport pickup !?)
Personable team , a nature reserve walk trail across the road.
The serenity of a treetop canapy , stillness and calm vibe hidden in suburbia -winning.
Thanks KTP

This place has done its time and is now due for a closure or new owners or something!

Just in a general state of disrepair and the owners aren't super keen to take responsibility and blame guests for not raising concerns while at the park. It's difficult to raise concerns when they're are so plentiful.

Overgrown Gardens, half done projects, general state of long term residents sites, general state of basic infrastructure, attitude of owners and the number of units and vans falling a part.

Not my cup of tea that's for sure.
Leaking water flooded our site told us to suck it up sounded like waterfall all night stayed 2 nights and still waiting for plumber

Run down property. The shower door couldn't shut and water pooled in the whole bathroom. I booked this place having a look on the website with expectations there would be a lot for the kids to do. Unfortunately, the tennis courts are run down. The playground was closed because it was undergoing renovations. The games room too was closed because it was going through renovations. So there was no pool table. Can easily say, we won't be coming back here again. The basketball court or hoop was also below average. If it wasn't for the pool they would have got a lower rating. There is no mention on the website to advise future guests about any renovations going on. We didn't stay our two nights we had booked.

Severe water leak been going for DAYS. Attempted to fix it during the day but when we returned to our campsite there is a full river running under the tent and makes it impossible to sleep with the constant sound of trickling water. We just got told to basically suck it up or move to the campsite above it eventhough sound still travels.

We stayed at the park for 4 weeks while waiting to move into our new house.|The staff are very friendly and helpful.|Yes, the park is a little run down but there are renovations happening which will bring it up to a higher standard.|The ablution blocks are old but are kept clean and the staff are doing their best to keep them looking fresh with a coat of paint. |I have no problem with recommending this park especially if you are traveling with a pet as there is a fenced area where you can exercise them.|And you definitely can’t complain about the tarrif .

The reception staff are absolutely amazing. I mentioned a favourite drink that I can't get where I live and the next day their fridge is stocked with it along with plenty of other sugar free options.
We have stayed here many times and has been great everytime.
You can see they're updating parts of the park.
Walking distance to shops and bus stop at doorstep.

I called up this property 23/11/2024 to ask a simple important information question about if the property took a damage deposit apon check-in. I was spoken to rudely over the phone and asked back into my ear "why would you ask a question like that, the answer to that question would be yes" but I explained how half the properties don't ask on the sites but ask for it at a surprise when you turn up at the property for check in. I am highly disappointed as I was going going to book into this place but as I had received this level of rudeness over the phone I knew I would've had more problems with this place. Very disappointed with the over the phone service over a simple question that no customer would wanna be stung with.
Manger is a legend  thanks mate

We stayed in a cabin was one of the worst cabins we have been in.
1 Bunk bed mattress was 300mm too skinny for the base.
2 Toilet/Shower door was off and leaning on the wall.
3 The only bedside lamp didn’t have a globe
4 The TV remote had no batteries
5 The range hood light not working and filters are not in it 6 The wash basin has green stain under tap from tap dripping
7 Kitchen window blind is 10cm to skinny for the window
8 Air conditioner was very dirty
9 Lino joiner strip on shower room floor cut short and sharp cut wife’s foot

I have stayed in the park on numerous occasions. The managers and all staff are very friendly, helpful, pleasant, professional and hard working. They attend to maintenance issues ASAP and always keep guests informed of expected timeframes. The amenities are always very clean with soap, hand towels etc readily available. The laundry is always clean and has recently been refurbished. The pool area has also been refurbished. Grounds maintenance is ongoing, with staff working extremely hard to maintain the grassed areas and the dump point. The dump point was out of use due to some people's  stupidity. The guests that I come into contact with on a daily basis are very happy staying in the park and have no complaints. If /when there are any issues they are always dealt with immediately, that is of course if they are brought to the managers attention. I would have no hesitation in recommending this park to anyone. The staff are amazing. The free bread, cakes, fruit etc are an added bonus. Thank you. Keep up the good work.

Worst pack we have stayed in.
The amenities block was not cleaned all weekend. (Although pointing this out to reception will get you thrown out) locks on toilet and shower doors missing. Water leaking everywhere. Do yourself a favour go and stay elsewhere. This is also so overpriced it’s a joke. The girl that answered the phone and took my booking was lovely. Not sure who it was in the office when I was leaving but he wanted to physically throw me out. This place is an absolute DISGRACE. Please do not stay here.

Kingsway Park in Perth is so far below standard it should not be open to the public.  Caravan Sites with no drainage.  No hot water.  A number of locks missing from showers.  2 shower heads missing.  Needs mowing, cleaning and overall upgrade.
It's the worst we've stayed in.  It's such a shame.

After reading some of the reviews I was reluctant to coming at this park but to my surprise I found the site, facilities and staff very good. Work was being done while I was there which is expected if you want a clean park. Thank goodness I don’t think much of peoples reviews.
Dirty, uncared for.
Avoid if possible,outdated and run down, amenities need replacing,dump point is a health risk,long grass,camp sites not maintained,still pay the $ for a 1 star caravan park, should be condemned.

Ein etwas vom Zentrum abgelegener Campingplatz.
Wir wurden am Telefon und Vorort sehr freundlich empfangen. Bei dem Campingplatz handelt es sich vermutlich um einen auf welchem vermehrt Dauercamper sind.
Die Toiletten und Duschen waren okay, aber schon in die Jahre gekommen.
Vor Ort hatten wir für den Camper Wasser und Strom. Des weiteren hab es eine Grillstelle, an welcher wir problemlos grillen konnten.

Extremely polite young ladies at reception
The care they show for there guests is great

Great Caravan park, been to kingsway
Caravan park twice this year and have seen renovations and clean up of park facilities,  still more to go but looking great!
Great service and team at the park.
Ladies at front desk are welcoming, helpful and cheerful 😁
Love the giant gum trees, though they prohibit the grass from growing, I looove hearing the birds throughout the day, especially the kookaburras. beautifully maintained grass where there are trees other than natives.
We are staying at a camp sites with its own toilet shower, it is nicely renovated,  and the one issues we had with plumbing were fixed promptly. (Thank you)!
Buses right outside take you directly to Perth or the nearest train station...
All in all kingsway is a great Caravan park for all and a great location if your here to sites see.

For almost $50 a night for an unpowered site, you would expect a nicer stay. Our site was strewn with bricks and pavers while backing onto caution tape with construction going on directly behind us. Amenities are definitely not to standard for what you pay for, missing and broken locks on stall doors, showers without heads, shower heads that just pour out a single stream of water, one of the toilets was missing it's entire back. Clearly, they are trying to revamp the park, which is great. However, charging market prices whilst it's in that condition is outrageous. Go elsewhere and pay the same (or cheaper) but get far accommodation.
Always a pleasure to stay here, very friendly and professional reception, clean facilities and a lovely pool.

Omg, I was shocked. The cabin we booked was absolutely disgusting inside and out..no photos online.
Run down and overgrown park. The cabin smelt of mould, rotting wood and mildew. Old fly screens and rubber mats strewn at the entrance of the cabin.
The bathroom was slimy, and old bandaids stuck on the  roting cracked tiled floor. Why do you use shower curtains in a public setting, yuk.
Second bite food in the reception, which is a reflection of the park.
Absolutely filthy. We requested our money back, which they did. They offered us the cabin next door, which was the same, smelly run down and dirty. Don't bother it's awful.
Overpriced,water gets turned off everyday because of leaks,tree branches fall on cars and caravans, ablution block gets messy

Overall this place is really nice. I don't know what all the hate is about. Rooms were so nice for me and the kids, staff were friendly. Everything worked really well (except the DVD player, we couldn't get it to open.) Otherwise I have stayed here over many occasions the only thing I can really complain about is that you can hear the traffic/cars on the road but otherwise this place is amazing.
So noisy and dirty I hate to say this but the park is unloved in many ways. You could tell the staff but I don't think they have the ability to clean it up with out a lot of help.

The room was pleasant, with full kitchen facilities, although the TV cords were precariously balanced along the top of the wardrobe and fell on me every time I opened it - was slightly concerned about electrocution. The patio stairs and railing were also a death trap and I was lucky not to have fallen and been injured.
Grounds / facilities tired and unkempt, tennis (?) court unusable - cracked and covered in weeds, and dog park was a mess of sh-bombs (likely due to inconsiderate owners).
My phone and watch charging cables 'mysteriously vanished' never to be seen again. Very inconvenient for the remainder of my holiday in WA.
We also had an interesting visit from a scary chap, closely followed by the police.
Shopping centre within walking distance.
Cannot recommend

Some very untidy and rubbished filled permant sites in this place....which brings the overall appearance of the park down....
Yes they are doing general work around the park....

Stayed 2 nights in a cabin April 2024.Very old cabins generally acceptable for price but a few negatives. Child play area very poor, lots of rubbish around whole site perimeter fencing and somewhat shonky cabling connecting tv and power. Not dangerous but when mentioned to reception just shrugged. Won’t be going back

Friendly Park
Great staff
Stay was great and just what I needed for my stay in Perth! Thanks so much

I don’t really understand some of the negative reviews! We had a lovely week staying here, the
facilities were all great and were always really clean, staff were friendly and went out of their way to help us during our stay! We had a nice large site so really can’t complain at all! I’d definitely recommend this caravan park!

Stayed on a site for a few weeks. Wonderful trees but not much gardening done. Looked in the ladies bathroom once (it was bright and clean), but for most of our stay it was closed for maintenance.  A water pipe burst and there was no water for a day and a half. The pool pump broke halfway through our stay and wasn't repaired before we left... it was very hot weather. All concrete pads need replacing or repair.

Answer for the camping :

What a lie as a « response » never seen something like that.
- I’ve asked for a cabin because they asked me to be in a closed area. No worries I’m not ashamed to live in a tent.

- We had problems with 1 couple (the thieves and we never spoke to them), and then we never came back to the office to complain about any neighbors.

- Yes I wore a bikini and my partner a buggy sumgglers is that worse than ballernia shoes? Maybe the camp park prefers the customers being in sweater during summer ?

- about the amenities : I’m impressed by the  imagination of the writer(s). Maybe someone did it but it wasn’t me. You should send one of your essai to a publishing house to show they the creativity of the writer(s). (Falsely accusing people is punishable by law).

- Never complain about the trash until it was very close to our tent, the trash close to the kitchen were enough.

- No one comes to tell us it was forbidden sorry for that, hopefully you won’t have to empty the garbage can by your arms a truck will come.

- About the kitchen lessons we know how to recognize dirty BBQ no worries about our way to cook.

- For the payment, we were late on the 2 first weeks then it was every Tuesdays until our last week (we paid 3 nights at the end of it)
- He took this picture by night after work ;)

Never your fault, you are ready to everything to defend your camp park (even lying and inventing things) but the 3.1⭐️ speak by their self.

We spend 3 months in this camping. We had no other option, it was the cheapest.

My partner and I don’t recommend this because :

- Men’s bathrooms : no soap, dirty, no toilet paper most of the time

- Ladies’s bathrooms : the middle amenities were closed for a really long period all day and the ones on the back of the camping weren’t locked and only 2 toilets and 2 showers for all the ladies in the camping.

- The BBQ took literally fire because of the dirt inside of it, in 5 days no one come to clean it (after that we left)

- Dead or alive cockroach in the share fridge

- Sometimes the fridge was turned off so everything melt

- They put a huge trash container at 1 meter from our tente. I let you imagine the smell of it days and nights especially with 40°C outside and the thousands of flies (no jokes it was really awful). The blond lady of the office told me “I not enough muscle to moving it”.

- Our neighbors stole us on our site. They came in our site to use our stuff a couple of time. They were supposed to left on a Thursday, they stayed 3 more weeks. Nothing as been done for us.

- A man comes to my site, 30 cm from inside the tente while I was dressing up. He see me in underwear and says me “hi” different times. He was supposed to leave ASAP, he stays longer.

- The water is turned off very often.

- Laundry not clean and only cold wash.

Most of the team was nice especially the young backpack and the brown hair lady in the office were really nice but the blond lady of the office who was really haughty and non helpful.
We spend 12 weeks for $3.240 no commercial gesture was made.

What a wonderful place to stay! Perfect location wrt to Perth CBD, beaches and shopping centers,  plenty of sightseeing in the vicinity, the pinnacles for a day trip, museums in the CBD, hobie sailing on the Swan, so much to do, so little time! Under the enthusiastic guidance of a young management team who are not only willing but actually go the extra mile to make your stay a pleasant and a memorable one. And not to forget being entertained by the kookaburras in the morning and the cockatoos the rest of the day, we are loving it. Oh, and before I forget, very pet friendly, they have their own playground!

This place is a dump. Too many bad points stacking up made us cut our stay short and book somewhere else. Kettle was disgusting, shower was cold, cockroach crawling on me in the middle of the night which must of entered via a hole in the wall under the bedside cabinet, faulty fridge making such a loud squealing noise multiple times a night waking us up. I have never had such bad accomodation before and we don’t stay in fancy places. But clean and hygienic is not hard to provide. No apology was given, just a refund for the night we didn’t stay. Grossly inadequate when a family trip has been tarnished and we have been left sleep deprived.  Photo and video evidence of it all.
Staff very obliging. Park badly in need of maintenance.
Very charming and scenic caravan park, some sevices required maintenance but overall  excellent and very close to major  services

Le pire camping de l'Australie.
En 4 mois de vacances je n'ai jamais vu ça. Même les free-camp sont plus propres qu'ici.
Regardez les photos.. la brosse de toilette est sur l'évier des lavabos. Les savons sont complètement cassé et laissé a l'abandon.
Cela fais trois jours que je suis là et toujours personne ne vient faire le ménage. Odeur nauséabonde.
Qa'd je suis arrivé il y avait une cannette vide et des mégots sur mon emplacement. Les machines à laver sont dégoûtantes et qu'une seule est en marche pour tout le camping.
Bref, ne venez pas ici !!

The ammenities are poorly maintained.
We had a campsite 19A near Wannaroo Rd which I we expected som noise from. However the onsite to the caravan site was poorly maintained as per photos attached. Toilet cistern was loose, tap was not fixed, no drainage for caravan waste water, pool  was green as chlorine system required extra chlorine add led by the pool man. The lady at reception was lovely. Generally the photos on the adverts do it reflect the true state of the caravan park and are misleading.
It appears I cannot post photos so feel free to ask me for photos.

We booked a powered site with an en suite , we were right by the very busy road , which would have been ok , but along with the dilapidated old toilet /shower room , broken dangerous tiles and overgrown plants and weeds , broken pavers etc , the whole place felt very unloved and dated .The photos on the website are very deceiving and obviously old pics . This place has potential , we liked the nice spacious pitches and it is in a good spot but unless they do major up grades we won't be back .

Stayed here on multiple occasions, I don't know what half the reviews are on about, friendly staff and residents, amenities are clean, there's powered and unpowered sites for really good prices.

From what I've heard the new management have really turned the place around and are constantly improving the park! Would recommend Kingsway to anyone

Wir schliefen in unserem Camper, haben zum Glück ein halbwegs passables privates Dusch- und WC Häuschen dazugemietet. Die naheliegende Strasse liess einen Schlaf zwischen Mitternacht und morgens um 5 Uhr zu. Der Camplatz ist ungepflegt, die Abfallkörbe und Container quellen über. Mal leeren wäre gut. Von drei Waschmaschinen war eine benutzbar.|Meine Erfahrung in Australien war, dass die Acclaim Campgrounds am schlechtesten waren und Kingsway bisher der aller schlechteste.
nice caravan park in perth area, alternative place to stay when you have mobile home.

Last minute booking as we needed to pull over for the night...wish we hadn't.
Run down and dirty

Stayed for 11 nights. Staff were friendly and approachable doing the best with the infrastructure they have available. Sometimes free bread and produce is offered to residents. Ablutions could do with a major injection of funds however didn’t bother us as we were self sufficient in our van. Location is great being close to shops, public transport and 15mins to beach. Spacious sites. Albeit not the fanciest park in town but great value for money with a 7th night free offer. Would stay again.

Bad service at desk, toilets not working when arrived but wasn't told when checking in, I went to let them know something was wrong, and was rudely told you "should off got a message about plumbing today", and told her "we only just checked in" and left, they didn't even walk around and flushed all the use toilets just sitting the full off everything yuck you could think off. Not using that place again
Live here 😁

Stayed here for a weekend and the staff were fantastic we had a problem with the TV but they came straight out and fixed it the best he could (It was a new TV so not there fault) but it was very comfortable and had everything we needed to be self sufficient will definitely stay again
Close to the city.

Very understanding of your situation and caring. Very helpful and knowledgeable with lovely professional advice. Cleaners do an amazing job, without a grip when some people who visit leave it in a mess. The ground man are hard working and polite. All in all love being here. They even give fruit veges and bread to their customers.
Friendly staff nice location pool was great, playground needed some repairs but rooms were fine basic but clean. Most of all very affordable.Had a lovely stay and will stay again. ❤️

We stayed here in our caravan, huge slabbed sites, definitely didn't feel ontop of each other like alot of other parks. Large dog exercise area which is fenced off and great for dog owners. Basketball net and small park for the kids. Amenities were clean and had everything we needed. Great location to stay and explore Perth, 5 mins from train station and bus stop right outside the park. We had a great stay and would definitely return. Also have a stay 7 pay 6 deal for campsites so worked out very affordable for a city stay.

The place has a lot of potential but is run down and tired.

Facilities listed on site were unable to be used during our stay (pool, recreation room etc) which was disappointing as it wasn't mentioned when booking and being charged full rate.

The cabin was tidy but the bathroom floor felt like it was going to collapse.

It's in a good spot close to shops.

plz stay away.  Don’t bring kids This place was filthy and full of drug addicts, the people on reception are very abusive and unhelpful, it was disgusting when  I stayed there a few months ago, but I was told recently  there is now new owners so thought I would give them a call to find out but received more abuse on the phone from from a lovely lady called SHELLY at reception , so obviously nothing as changed. Park from hell
Dirty , dirty can't say anything else.  The people were rude and for the price you pay for accommodation you expect much better than this place offers . If I could give no stars , I would .

Near shops , camp kitchen .
Amenties clean but not

We had a cabin with a double bed there was plenty of room,
The cabin had a great kitchen
The park is centrally located
AVOID AVOID AVOID
Friendly and well located

Great place to stay, all the staff is very friendly and Skye the manager exceeded our expectations.
Would stay again here
Very run down laundry was dirty yard maintenance non existence.   Very disappointing.
Nice  clean and tidy

This was by far the worst caravan park we have ever stayed in. It looked as if there had been no maintenance done in years, Gardens full of weeds, cracked concrete slabs, dirty kitchen areas, grubby laundry.  The dump Point was discussing.  Don’t stay there!!
We were in a site with an abandoned caravan and 2 cars next to us, one car with a flat tire.
